message:
fix(tui): add CI/TERM=dumb detection for plain text fallback output

- Add should_use_plain_output() in hook.rs for CI/TERM=dumb detection
- Add print_plain_warning() for plain text output without box-drawing chars
- Add CI check to should_use_rich_output() in output/mod.rs
- Fix pack command test to use correct subcommand syntax
- NO_COLOR now only disables ANSI colors, not box formatting

This ensures proper output formatting in CI environments while maintaining
visual box output for users who set NO_COLOR but still want structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
